message: 🌱 Add thanos: Compactor/Store Gateway/Bucket UI: Enable finding mission (#645)

+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify thanos troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your thanos deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n thanos -l app.kubernetes.io/name=thanos\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=thanos -n thanos --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review thanos configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant thanos configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n thanos -l app.kubernetes.io/name=thanos\nkubectl get configmap -n thanos -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=thanos\n```\n**Thanos, Prometheus and Golang version used**:\n\n* Thanos `quay.io/thanos/thanos:v0.25.2`\n* Thanos `quay.io/thanos/thanos:v0.26.0`\n* Thanos `quay.io/thanos/thanos:v0.27.0`\n* ..."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Compactor/Store Gateway/Bucket UI: Enable finding",
+        "description": "Add null check to find overlapping blocks logic to solve #5359.\n```yaml\nlevel=warn ts=2022-05-12T12:27:10.72680398Z caller=ui.go:204 component=bucketUI msg=\"Could not get file\" err=\"AssetInfo pkg/ui/static/react/static/js/main.eec2650e.chunk.js.map not found\" file=pkg/ui/static/react/static/js/main.eec2650e.chunk.js.map\nlevel=warn ts=2022-05-12T12:27:10.68813083Z caller=ui.go:204 component=bucketUI msg=\"Could not get file\" err=\"AssetInfo pkg/ui/static/react/static/js/2.f69d72f3.chunk.js.map not found\" file=pkg/ui/static/react/static/js/2.f69d72f3.chunk.js.map\nlevel=warn ts=2022-05-12T12:27:10.787708375Z caller=ui.go:204 component=bucketUI msg=\"Could not get file\" \n```"
+      },

+        "title": "Confirm Compactor/Store Gateway/Bucket UI: Enable finding is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=thanos -n thanos --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n thanos --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
